GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks with mocked HTTP responses (127 tests total)
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Integration between modules with realistic mock data
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Full pipeline from MCP tool call to response, including edge cases
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log API keys or full request/response payloads.

VF-001.NAME: CriticReviewHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: Kilo Agent вызывает critic_review с кодом для ревью
VF-001.expected-outcome: Структурированный ответ с критическими проблемами, рекомендациями, замечаниями + metadata footer

VF-002.NAME: APIErrorHandling
VF-002.expected-outcome: Retry на 429/5xx (до 2 раз с backoff), информативное сообщение об ошибке, не краш сервера

VF-003.NAME: HealthCheck
VF-003.expected-outcome: Возвращается статус конфигурации и расчёт стоимости за 1M токенов

VF-004.NAME: ArchitectureReview
VF-004.scenario: Kilo Agent вызывает architecture_review с описанием архитектуры
VF-004.expected-outcome: Специализированный архитектурный анализ: паттерны, зависимости, масштабируемость, риски

VF-005.NAME: SecurityAudit
VF-005.scenario: Kilo Agent вызывает security_audit с кодом для аудита
VF-005.expected-outcome: Специализированный анализ безопасности с severity classification (🔴🟡🟠🔵)

VF-006.NAME: FollowupDialog
VF-006.scenario: Kilo Agent вызывает critic_followup с вопросом по предыдущему ревью
VF-006.expected-outcome: Ответ строится на основе previous_review контекста

VF-007.NAME: ContentSizeLimit
VF-007.expected-outcome: Контент truncation до лимита, предупреждение в логе

VF-008.NAME: ReloadConfig
VF-008.scenario: Kilo Agent вызывает reload_config после изменения .env

VF-009.NAME: RestartServer
VF-009.expected-outcome: Процесс завершается через os._exit(0), MCP клиент auto-restart

VF-010.NAME: SecretStrProtection
VF-010.scenario: API ключ хранится как SecretStr — проверяется что ключ не утекает через repr/str
VF-010.expected-outcome: config.api_key возвращает SecretStr('**********'), только get_secret_value() даёт реальный ключ

VF-011.NAME: ConfigValidation
VF-011.expected-outcome: Pydantic rejects invalid values: agent_count=0, timeout=-1, api_key=""

VF-012.NAME: DecoratorAgentCountClamping
VF-012.expected-outcome: Decorator validates and clamps before passing to critic functions

scenarios.scenario-1: Config loads from env vars with valid API key
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing API key raises clear error
scenarios.scenario-3: Default values applied correctly (agent_count=16, timeout=300, log_level=INFO)
scenarios.scenario-5: Price fields loaded from POLZA_PRICE_INPUT_PER_1M / POLZA_PRICE_OUTPUT_PER_1M
scenarios.scenario-6: api_key is SecretStr — empty string rejected (min_length=1)

scenarios.scenario-1: Correct Responses API request format for agent_count=4 (effort=low)
scenarios.scenario-2: Correct Responses API request format for agent_count=16 (effort=high)
scenarios.scenario-6: Retry on 429 with exponential backoff Retry on 5xx (up to 2 retries) Dynamic timeout: 4 agents → 90s, 16 agents → config timeout MAX_CONTENT_CHARS truncation applied Cost calculation: tokens × price_per_1m CritiqueResult dataclass fields populated correctly Persistent AsyncClient via get_client()

scenarios.scenario-2: Prompt includes focus areas when specified
scenarios.scenario-3: System prompts (3 types) are comprehensive and in Russian
scenarios.scenario-4: _perform_review DRY function works for all 3 review types
scenarios.scenario-8: health_check returns config and pricing info

scenarios.scenario-1: critic_review tool registered with correct schema
scenarios.scenario-2: architecture_review tool registered with correct schema
scenarios.scenario-3: security_audit tool registered with correct schema
scenarios.scenario-4: critic_followup tool registered with correct schema
scenarios.scenario-8: _format_result adds metadata footer (model, agents, tokens, cost, review_id)
scenarios.scenario-11: _review_tool decorator catches exceptions and returns user-friendly errors
scenarios.scenario-14: reload_config_tool uses get_secret_value() for masked display

Gate-Phase-1.goal: Config and API client have deterministic tests passing

required-evidence.evidence-2: API request format matches Responses API spec

Gate-Phase-2.goal: Critic logic correctly builds prompts and handles mock responses

Gate-Phase-3.goal: MCP server runs with 7 tools accessible

Gate-Phase-4.goal: Specialized reviews and DRY refactoring validated

required-evidence.evidence-1: _perform_review DRY logic works for all review types

Gate-Phase-5.goal: Operations tools and safety limits working

required-evidence.evidence-1: 127/127 tests pass on both Windows and VM

Gate-Phase-7.goal: Security hardening, DRY decorator, config validations validated

required-evidence.evidence-1: 127/127 tests pass including SecretStr, config validation, decorator tests
required-evidence.evidence-2: api_key never appears in logs or repr output
